rulings.Case Title: MARTINEZ VS INTERSHOP COMMUNICATIONS AG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Sustaining Defendants' Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend;
rulings.Rulings: DENY. MOVANT'S DECLARATION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1008(A) AND NO BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: NELSON VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NO CREDIBLE EVIDENCE THAT HE WAS EVER EXPOSED TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS, ASBESTOS CONTAINING OR OTHERWISE. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: HEMPEN VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PER CCP 437C(G).

rulings.Case Title: CHOW VS SASON
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Setting Aside Judgments
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND REINSTATE TRIAL DE NOVO REQUEST BASED ON DISCRETIONARY PORTION OF CCP 473. (KS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: PETERSON VS WHLOE FOODS MARKET INC
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CHRISTINE PETERSON. OVERRULE DEMURRER AS TO MICHAEL RAWLS AS HE NEED NOT HAVE SIGNED THE COMPLAINT TO HAVE CAPACITY TO SUE. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ESTATE OF RODNEY RAWLS NO LEGAL CAPACITY UNDER ANY CAUSE OF ACTION NOW ALLEGED ON BEHALF OF CHRISTINE PETERSON. (AL(FLTR))

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL VS DOUVAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renewed Motion For Special Reference Under Ccp 639(A)(5) Appointment Of Referee
rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 8-27-02 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

rulings.Case Title: KAREN TORAN VS. FRANCIS M. JONES et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION, 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, AND 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL TERMINATION. DEMURRER MOOT AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION. CLAIM THAT PUNITIVE DAMAGES CANNOT BE CLAIMED AGAINST STATE OF CALIFORNIA IMPROPERLY RAISED IN DEMURRER SHOULD HAVE BEEN RAISED IN MOTION TO STRIKE. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: JEROME BERG VS. THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Declaring Pltf'S A Vexatious Litigant, Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security Imposing Pre-Filing Order Re New Litigation Under Ccp 391
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR ORDER DECLARING PLAINTIFF JEROME BERG A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY, AND IMPOSING PRE-FILING ORDER RE NEW LITIGATION UNDER CCP SECTION 391 ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. HEARING REQUIRED TO DETERMINE AMOUNT OF SECURITY. (JH)
